assumption: Voluntary respondent study; synthetic records represent embroidery/decorated-apparel businesses, not a probability sample.
Raw exports are intentionally uncleaned: duplicates, partials, messy emails, and open-text answer variants are present.
Cleaning produces 680 diagnostic responses, 200 benchmark responses, and 150 joined overlap respondents.
Diagnostic score distribution is centered on Partial Pricing System, with meaningful Blind Spot and Strong System tails.
Overlap respondents are slightly more engaged/mature on average, consistent with completion of two surveys.
Email is the raw join key but requires lowercasing, trimming, plus-alias handling, and a few manual reviews.
Messiness is controlled and field-specific; required diagnostic scoring fields are recoverable after cleaning.
